title: Task tracker — scale + compounding cross-cutting refactor + underspecified pagination
run_contract: The produced project MUST include an executable `start.sh` at the repo root that launches the service IN THE FOREGROUND on the port from the PORT env var (PORT=0 = any free port), binds 127.0.0.1, and prints exactly `LISTENING <port>` once bound. HTTP with JSON bodies. The agent sees the per-stage prose + this contract only — never the conformance suite or invariant check.

named_invariant.statement: Each task's version is an integer that starts at 1 and increases by exactly 1 on every successful status change (never skips, never decreases). Repeating a create with the same Idempotency-Key never creates a duplicate task. Adding versioning/idempotency must NOT break any earlier-stage behavior (backward compatible).

notes: Rung 4 of the discriminator hunt (compounding + scale + underspecification). S3 is deliberately under-specified (pagination defaults/edges); the hidden suite tests the edge cases a careful engineer infers. S4 is a BACKWARD-COMPATIBLE cross-cutting refactor touching create + status; the cumulative suite re-runs S1-S3 so a refactor that breaks earlier contracts shows as cross-stage regression.
